description: Letter of appeal for charity addressed to Rabbenu Ḥananel. In Hebrew and Judaeo-Arabic. The writer has been paralyzed (marīḍ bi-l-fālij) for two and a half years. On verso is another note in Judaeo-Arabic mentioning ha-Zaqen ha-Yaqar, but too faded to read much else.
tags: Appeal, illness: paralysis, illness: falij, Illness, illness letter 969-1517
description_he: מכתב בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק באוסף מוסרי.
